issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is vendor-locked to Azure and assumes specific tools, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: create-hourly-timer-function
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items (Node.js code, schedule, handler, func new) but misses func init and exact naming; Response B is in C# and omits all required Node.js elements.

scenarios.name: setup-order-orchestrator
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A omits key activities and uses the wrong starter pattern.
